productDisplayName: ADIDAS Kids Adispeed Black Sports Shoes
description: If running is what your little one likes, then there's no better way to hone the skills of those young legs than with this pair of adiSPEED+ running shoes. Light in weight and well cushioned, kids are sure to find their energy doubling with each stride.UpperMeshed upper for maximum breathabilityStrategically placed synthetic overlays for added shoe structureSlip-on style with elastic bands on the forefoot length and a midfoot strap with a velcro closure to offer a snug, customised FitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for all-day comfortPadded Ortholite footbed for in-step and anti-bacterial comfort adidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleMidsolePhylon insole for anabsolutely cushioned ride, lightweight comfort and enhanced impact protectionOutsoleNon-marking rubber outsole for enhanced durability, with flex grooves for ease of movement Herringbone-styled lugs in the forefoot, with multi-directional lugs and grooves in the heel for absolute grip and tractionScooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the backfoot and anklesShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
